description: A reader should fail sync when the seed emits a root OBJECT after MANIFEST but before that root has been requested.

assertions.description: Reader rejects OBJECT because the seed sent the root revision before any WANT requested it.
Reader does not write a manifest or verified object set after the unrequested root OBJECT violation.

notes: Extends the simulator matrix with a post-MANIFEST pending-request negative interop case for root revisions.
The seed still uses the normal peer-store transcript generator, but the harness moves the first root OBJECT to immediately after MANIFEST.
